issues.sample: The contact owns a 2019 Kia Cadenza. The contact stated that while driving at an undisclosed speed, several unknown warning lights illuminated. Additionally, upon starting the vehicle later, the contact noticed that there was an abnormal ticking sound coming from under the hood.

narrative.headline: What 2019 Kia Cadenza owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 4 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Tires (25% of reports).
